calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Gregory S. Lathrop, Petitioner.

The court advises that it is inclined to grant the instant petition but would first like to discuss whether Charles Schwab's conditional provision is required. Mr. Feder reports that the provision is required because there are currently no candidates available to serve as further Successor Trustee should the Petitioner be unable to serve as Trustee. Mr. Feder offers additional advocacy in support of the petition. The court advises Mr. Feder that it is satisfied with the advocacy that he has provided to the court and therefore reiterates that it is inclined to grant the petition.

The Petition for Modification of Trust, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
